title: Create: Cobblemon Factories
description: All Pokeball and cooking pot recipes createified!
body:
A simple mod (basically a datapack. . .) made to add create based recipes for pokeballs and cooking pot recipes to cobblemon! I plan to add more compatibility features as time moves foward, but however am stalled due to motivation. 

Planned implementations:
- Make cobblemon machines use rotation to function
- Redo potion recipes using liquid (trying to figure out liquids rn)
- Berry harvester compatibility

Development will likely be very slow as I am new to minecraft modding and barely know what I am doing.
